use-nerdfont-icons.description: Enable Nerd Font icons in the UI. Default: true.

stage-diff-context-lines.description: Number of context lines shown around each diff hunk in the staging view. Clamped to 0–20. Default: 1.

input-modal-bottom.description: Vertical position of the text-input overlay. An integer means fixed lines from the bottom, a percentage string (e.g. "5%") means a fraction of screen height from the bottom, and "center" places it in the middle of the screen. Default: "5%".

oneOf.description: Fixed number of lines from the bottom of the screen.
Percentage of screen height from the bottom (e.g. "5%").
Center the overlay vertically on the screen.

name-aliases.description: Exact full-name aliases used for kitty session names.

important-refs.description: Rules for highlighting important refs in the log view. Refs matching a rule get a bright colored badge; all others get a dim surface badge. Rules are evaluated in order — the first match wins. The order also controls sort priority: refs matching earlier rules appear first.

patterns.description: Regular expressions matched against the full ref name (e.g. "^main$", "^origin/main$", "^v\\d").

color.description: Badge color. Named Catppuccin colors: blue, green, yellow, orange, mauve, teal, red, surface. Or a hex value: #rrggbb or #rgb.

hide-refs.description: Regular expressions matched against the full ref name. Matching refs are hidden from the log view entirely. Takes priority over important-refs. Default: empty (nothing hidden).
